creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-06 15:33:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/py-oauth         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  py-oauth is a python libarary for OAuth. OAuth is an open
  protocol to allow API authentication in a simple and standard
  method from desktop and web applications.
  
  WWW:    http://pypi.python.org/pypi/oauth/
  
  PR:             ports/129410
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2054    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/net/py-oauth/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/py-oauth/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net/py-oauth/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/net/py-oauth/pkg-plist (new)
